$comment: Layer B selection cases for REORDER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS INDEXED BY). Candidate B makes the SET UP BY off by one (picks price occurrence 2, 1.55, instead of 3, 1.75), so BASE/FEE/TOTAL are wrong on every non-zero quantity - the index-arithmetic defect, caught by layer B. Cases cover a typical order, the 500.00 BULK boundary, a fee half-cent tie, and zero and max quantities.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REORDER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-reorder)
